dw.award_recipients.award_id: Award identifier (nvarchar) — internal ID, rarely needed in queries.
dw.award_recipients.award_name: Award name (nvarchar) — use exact value e.g. 'NLCS MVP', 'NL Cy Young','AL Cy Young','World Series MVP', 'Gold Glove'. Filter: WHERE ar.award_name = 'NLCS MVP'
dw.award_recipients.award_date: Date award was given (nvarchar) — CAST to date if filtering: CAST(ar.award_date AS date)
dw.award_recipients.season: Season year (nvarchar) — always quote: WHERE ar.season = '2025'. Use BETWEEN '2024' AND '2025' for ranges.
dw.award_recipients.team_id: Team ID (bigint) — JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = ar.team_id to get team name.
dw.award_recipients.player_id: Player ID (bigint) — JOIN dw.mlbplayers p ON p.id = ar.player_id to get full player details.
dw.award_recipients.player_name: Player full name (nvarchar) — already on dw.award_recipients, no JOIN needed for name only.
dw.award_recipients.notes: Optional notes (nvarchar) — may be NULL, use ISNULL(ar.notes, '') if displaying.

dw.games.game_pk: Primary key. Unique integer ID for each game.
dw.games.game_date: Date of game stored as varchar 'YYYY-MM-DD'. Filter with = '2025-06-30'. Use YEAR(g.game_date) = 2025 for year filtering.
dw.games.series_description: Type of game series. Values: 'Regular Season', 'Division Series', 'World Series'.
dw.games.double_header: varchar. 'Y' if this game is part of a doubleheader, 'N' otherwise.
dw.games.status__detailed_state: Game status. Values: 'Final', 'In Progress', 'Postponed', 'Scheduled'. Always filter completed games with = 'Final'.
dw.games.teams__home__team__id: integer FK to dw.teams.id for the home team. USE THIS for joins.
dw.games.teams__away__team__id: integer FK to dw.teams.id for the away team. USE THIS for joins.
dw.games.teams__home__is_winner: bit. 1 if home team won. Simpler alternative to comparing scores.
dw.games.teams__away__is_winner: bit. 1 if away team won. Simpler alternative to comparing scores.
dw.games.day_night: 'day' if day game 'night' if night game
dw.games.teams__home__team__name: IGNORE - use t_home.name from JOIN instead.
dw.games.teams__away__team__name: IGNORE - use t_away.name from JOIN instead.
dw.games.teams__home__team__link: IGNORE - URL string, do not join on this.
dw.games.teams__away__team__link: IGNORE - URL string, do not join on this.

dw.teams.id: Primary key integer. Join target for games home/away team IDs.
dw.teams.name: Full team name e.g. 'San Francisco Giants'.
dw.teams.league__name: Full league name e.g. 'National League', 'American League'.
dw.teams.division__name: Full division name e.g. 'National League West', 'American League East'.

dw.draft.year: Composite PK (part 1). Draft year e.g. 2024, 2025. Always filter by this when filtering by draft year.
dw.draft.pick_number: Composite PK (part 2). Overall pick number (1-1500+). Unique within a year.
dw.draft.bis_player_id: Foreign key to baseball info systems player identifier.
dw.draft.person__full_name: Full name of the draft pick.
dw.draft.home__state: Player home state. Values vary: may be abbreviation 'CA' or full name 'California'. Always filter using IN ('CA', 'California').
dw.draft.team__name: Name of the MLB team that drafted the player.
dw.draft.school__name: School the player was drafted from. High School players have names containing ' HS', 'High School', 'Prep', or 'Academy'. Join to dw.school_type_lookup on school_name for cleaner filtering.
dw.draft.school__state: State where the school is located.
dw.draft.school__city: City where the school is located.
dw.draft.signing_bonus: Signing bonus amount stored as nvarchar. ALWAYS cast before sorting: CAST(signing_bonus AS decimal(18,2)). Filter nulls with: signing_bonus IS NOT NULL AND signing_bonus != ''.

dw.school_type_lookup.school_name: School name. FK to dw.draft.school__name. Join: dw.draft.school__name = dw.school_type_lookup.school_name.
dw.school_type_lookup.school_type: Classification of the school. Values: 'High School', 'Junior College', 'University/College'.
dw.school_type_lookup.classified_by: How this row was classified. Values: 'regex' (automated), 'manual' (human corrected).

dw.fact_atbat.result: Text values: 'In play, no out', 'In play, out(s)', 'Foul' -- use exact string match.
dw.fact_atbat.pitches_count: Pitch Count- Integer -- CAST to decimal for AVG().
dw.fact_atbat.balls: Balls Integers -- full count is balls = 3 AND strikes = 2.

dw.pitch_core.pitch_type: Type of Pitch. Values: 'Slurve','Knuckle Ball','Sweeper','Eephus','Knuckle Curve','Splitter','Fastball','Two-Seam Fastball','Unknown','Sinker','Four-Seam Fastball','Screwball','Forkball','Changeup','Cutter','Curveball','Slider','Slow Curve'.

dw.player_stats.player__id: Player ID. FK to dw.mlbplayers.id if joining for additional player info.
dw.player_stats.player__full_name: Full player name e.g. 'Mookie Betts'. Use for WHERE filters.
dw.player_stats.team__name: Full team name e.g. 'San Francisco Giants'. Use for team filters.
dw.player_stats.position__type: Position category. Values: 'Hitter', 'Pitcher', 'Fielder', 'Catcher'. Use to separate hitters from pitchers.
dw.player_stats.stat__avg: Batting average stored as nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__avg AS decimal(10,3)). Filter plate_appearances >= 300 for qualifiers.
dw.player_stats.stat__obp: On-base percentage stored as nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__obp AS decimal(10,3)).
dw.player_stats.stat__slg: Slugging percentage stored as nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__slg AS decimal(10,3)).
dw.player_stats.stat__ops: OPS stored as nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__ops AS decimal(10,3)).
dw.player_stats.stat__era: ERA stored as nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__era AS decimal(10,2)). Lower = better.
dw.player_stats.stat__whip: WHIP stored as nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__whip AS decimal(10,3)). Lower = better.
dw.player_stats.stat__innings_pitched: Innings pitched stored as nvarchar. CAST for math: CAST(stat__innings_pitched AS decimal(10,1)).
dw.player_stats.stat__fielding: Fielding percentage stored as nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__fielding AS decimal(10,3)).
dw.player_stats.stat__games_started: Games started as pitcher integer. Use >= 10 for starter qualification.
dw.player_stats.stat__games_pitched: Total games pitched integer. Use for reliever queries.
dw.player_stats.stat__plate_appearances: Plate appearances integer. Always filter >= 300 for batting title qualifiers.
dw.player_stats.stat__strike_outs: Strikeouts integer. Used for both hitter and pitcher strikeouts.
dw.player_stats.stat__strikeouts_per9_inn: Strikeouts per 9 innings nvarchar. CAST before sorting: CAST(stat__strikeouts_per9_inn AS decimal(10,2)).
dw.player_stats.stat__fielding: Fielding percentage nvarchar. CAST before sorting.
dw.player_stats.stat__chances: Total fielding chances integer. Filter >= 100 for fielding qualifiers.

dw.rosters.person__id: MLB player ID -- use to JOIN dw.mlbplayers ON p.id = r.person__id
dw.rosters.jersey_number: Jersey number stored as nvarchar -- CAST to int for numeric sort: CAST(jersey_number AS int)
dw.rosters.position__code: Short position code e.g. '1' = pitcher, '2' = catcher
dw.rosters.status__code: Roster status: 'A' = active, 'D10'=Injured 10-Day, 'D15'=Injured 15-Day, 'D60'=Injured 60-Day, other codes = IL/restricted/etc.
dw.rosters.status__description: Human-readable status e.g. 'Active','Released','Waived','Traded','Free Agent','Minor League Contract','Claimed','Administrative Leave','Reserve List (Minors)','Injured 10-Day','Forty Man','Ineligible List','Bereavement List','Designated for Assignment','Injured 60-Day','Injured 15-Day','Reassigned to Minors'
dw.rosters.season: Season year as integer e.g. 2025 -- use WHERE r.season = 2025
dw.rosters.parent_team_id: Team ID -- JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = r.parent_team_id to get team name
